tasks.title: Define Full Backup JSON Schema in packages/import-export/src/schemas/full-backup-schema.ts
tasks.description: Create a Zod schema definition for the full backup JSON format representing all user data including vocabulary, sessions, mistakes, content edits, and settings. This schema will be used for validation during import/export operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Full backup schema covers all relevant data types
Schema validates example full backup JSON data

outputPlan.description: Zod schema for full backup JSON format

metadata.inputContext: Needs knowledge of all user data types and existing partial schemas
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides validation foundation for full backup import/export

tasks.title: Implement exportAllData() to generate Full Backup JSON in packages/import-export/src/export.ts
tasks.description: Add exportAllData() function that reads all user data from IndexedDB repositories and aggregates into a single JSON object matching the full backup schema. Include metadata and versioning info.
acceptanceCriteria: exportAllData() returns complete JSON with all user data
Output JSON validates against full backup schema

outputPlan.description: Add exportAllData() function for full backup export

metadata.inputContext: Needs full backup schema and access to all data repositories
evidence: exportAllData() tested and returns valid JSON
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables exporting all user data as a single JSON backup

tasks.title: Implement importBackup() to import Full Backup JSON in packages/import-export/src/import.ts
tasks.description: Add importBackup() function that accepts full backup JSON, validates it against the schema, and writes all data into the appropriate IndexedDB repositories. Handle merge and overwrite options.
acceptanceCriteria: importBackup() validates input JSON against schema
Data is correctly inserted or merged into IndexedDB
Handles overwrite and merge modes correctly

outputPlan.description: Add importBackup() function for full backup import

metadata.inputContext: Needs full backup schema, exportAllData(), and data repository interfaces
evidence: importBackup() tested with valid and invalid data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables restoring user data from full backup JSON

tasks.title: Add validation logic for full backup import in packages/import-export/src/validate.ts
tasks.description: Implement validateImportData() function that uses the full backup schema to validate incoming JSON data before import. Return detailed validation results and error messages.
acceptanceCriteria: validateImportData() correctly validates valid and invalid JSON
Returns clear error messages for schema violations

outputPlan.description: Add validation function for full backup JSON

evidence: validation tested with various JSON inputs

tasks.title: Integrate full backup import/export in ImportExportService in packages/import-export/src/ImportExportService.ts
tasks.description: Modify ImportExportService to add methods exportFullBackup() and importFullBackup() that wrap exportAllData() and importBackup() respectively, exposing full backup functionality to the application layer.
acceptanceCriteria: ImportExportService exposes full backup import/export methods
Methods correctly call underlying functions and handle errors

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Exposes full backup functionality to UI and other layers

tasks.title: Add UI components for Full Backup Export and Import in apps/web/src/features/import-export/FullBackup.tsx
tasks.description: Create React components for user to export full backup JSON file and import from a JSON file. Include file picker, progress indicators, error handling, and success messages. Use ImportExportService methods.
acceptanceCriteria: UI allows user to export full backup JSON file
UI allows user to select and import full backup JSON file
Shows validation errors and import progress

outputPlan.description: React components for full backup import/export UI

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides user interface for full backup import/export

tasks.title: Add unit and integration tests for full backup import/export features
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests covering schema validation, exportAllData(), importBackup(), ImportExportService methods, and UI components. Include edge cases, error handling, and data integrity checks.
acceptanceCriteria: All new code paths have test coverage
Edge cases and error scenarios tested

outputPlan.description: Tests for ImportExportService full backup methods
Tests for full backup UI components

metadata.inputContext: Needs all full backup implementation code
evidence: coverage reports show new code covered
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliability and correctness of full backup features

tasks.title: Update documentation for full backup import/export in docs/import-export.md
tasks.description: Add detailed documentation describing the full backup JSON format, usage instructions for export and import features, validation rules, and troubleshooting tips.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation clearly explains full backup format and usage
